name: Kekomon
description: A Slime Digimon with a richly colored body surface. Although it has a soft and flexible body surface, its three horns are unusually hard for a Slime-type and are useful for defending itself when attacked by intruders. When it senses danger, it spews " Nenchakusei no Awa " from its mouth to distract the opponent, and then seizes the opportunity to flee.
